scripts.install-all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.seed-all: cd backend && node src/seed/seedAdmin.js && node src/seed/seedTables.js && node src/seed/seedMenu.js
scripts.start: cd backend && npm install && node src/server.js
